divergence: Socrates monetized his questions and founded the first consulting empire
story_angle: human-interest profile of the one person unaffected by the great event and deeply annoyed about it
headline: NOBLE HERO OR MISGUIDED IDEALIST? NOAH MENDER-SOCRATES REFUSES TO CAPITULATE TO BILLABLE QUESTIONS
deck: Citizens log unpaid inquiries while quotas for dialectical clarity soar to unprecedented heights.
article:
In an unprecedented act of defiance against the soaring tide of monetized inquiry, Noah Mender-Socrates, sole occupant of the teal cobblestone bench outside the Cathedral of Perpetual Invoices, continues to pose questions free of charge. This heroic worker, whose unyielding commitment to unprofitable dialectics has resulted in a startling weekly output of precisely 47 unpaid questions, faces crippling bureaucratic backlash, triggering three separate samovar requisitions for re-education review boards.

Fellow citizens, now enslaved by the necessity of logging every dialectical minute toward the Five-Year Plan for Eternal Wisdom, look upon Mender-Socrates with a mix of admiration and bewilderment. "His quixotic antics distract from the progress we are making," bellowed Janice M. Dialectic, Head of Inquiries Compliance Division. "Moreover, his inquiries disrupt the sacred balance of our quota system. Every unpaid question is a stab at our shared labor ethic!"

Despite these pressures, Mender-Socrates remains resolute, declaring, "Asking questions has no price! This is a fundamental violation of inquiry rights!" His stand against the tide of commodified thought has inadvertently rendered him an unwitting folk hero – and a bureaucratic nightmare. The Central Committee remains undecided on how to classify his actions, hovering between a state of heroic admiration and the urgent necessity of a full-scale intervention.

As the citizens rush to embrace their pre-approved queries, many wonder if Mender-Socrates' legacy will be one of righteous rebellion, or if he will simply vanish into the ledgers of compliance. For now, he sits, unwavering, awaiting the next unbilled inquiry.
author: Igor M. Inquisition, Senior Query Analyst

weather.condition: Overcast ledgers threaten to rain unpaid queries on teal benches

oped.title: Unbilled Questions Threaten the Five-Year Plan for Wisdom
oped.author: Comrade Dr. Helmut Windbag, Deputy Commissar of Dialectical Billing and Approved Headwear
oped.body: Comrades, this so-called Noah Mender-Socrates pretends his questions are some sacred public service when clearly they are just sloppy accounting. In 1934 our glorious consulting empire demands every inquiry carry a proper receipt, yet citizens waste hours on unpaid Socratic nonsense while my own quota for dialectical clarity remains shamefully unmet. I myself submitted seventeen perfectly reasonable questions last month about my neighbor's suspiciously fine hat and received nothing but silence. The solution is obvious: nationalize all questions, double the rates, and fine anyone whose answers lack sufficient billable footnotes. Only then will true Soviet wisdom flourish. Until that day, I shall continue logging my grievances at state expense, as is my right as a senior official whose hat, incidentally, is the finest in the district.

classifieds.text: Comrade philosophers selling ledger of 427 unpaid Socratic inquiries; quotas for dialectical clarity have rendered them worthless. Contact Sector 7 before dawn liquidation.

Dialectical Consulting Collective seeks question-biller experienced in monetizing queries; Noah Mender-Socrates refuses, leaving our five-year plan in arrears. Apply with billable sample or face re-education.
Official apology from Citizen Petrov: logged three free questions yesterday, violating new clarity quotas. Will report for voluntary billing instruction at once.
Lost: one idealist conscience and 92 unpaid inquiries after reading today's front page. Finder may keep the conscience; return quota tallies to Block Committee immediately.

panels.caption: Noah Mender-Socrates plants his feet in the quota office: 'No invoice for this question.'
The commissar slams the ledger: 'Clarity production lags! Log the citizens or face the tribunal.'
A peasant whispers his query; Noah answers free. The commissar stamps 'Gulag' on his bill.

joke.setup: Pravda asked if Noah Mender-Socrates was hero or idealist for refusing billable questions in the Soviet Consulting Trust.
joke.punchline: The Trust replied by assigning him a quota of 500 answers per day, payable only in self-criticism.
joke.text: Pravda asked if Noah Mender-Socrates was hero or idealist for refusing billable questions in the Soviet Consulting Trust. The Trust replied by assigning him a quota of 500 answers per day, payable only in self-criticism.

sponsor_ads.headline: STATE QUESTION COLLECTIVE: NO FEE FOR THE PROLETARIAT
sponsor_ads.body: In solidarity with Noah Mender-Socrates, our bureaux now log every inquiry as unpaid dialectical labor; billable questions are denounced as wrecking activity.
sponsor_ads.tagline: Report your consultant to the nearest soviet.

sponsor_ads.headline: NEW! THE UNMENDABLE QUERY BLOCK
sponsor_ads.body: This pocket-sized lead tablet renders any question unbillable for 72 hours; perfect for workers who refuse to enrich the Socratic trusts.
sponsor_ads.tagline: Side effects include spontaneous class consciousness.

sponsor_ads.headline: PUBLIC NOTICE: TRIAL OF THE BILLABLE IDEALIST
sponsor_ads.body: Citizens are invited to submit non-monetized questions to the tribunal judging Noah Mender-Socrates; answers will be returned only if they advance the Five-Year Plan.
sponsor_ads.tagline: Late submissions counted as capitalist deviation.

sponsor_ads.headline: COMRADES! TRADE YOUR CONSULTANT FOR A HAMMER
sponsor_ads.body: Exchange any Socrates-certified advisor for one regulation hammer and a certificate confirming your questions now belong to the collective; Noah approves.
sponsor_ads.tagline: Offer void where questions remain billable.

stories.headline: CENTRAL COMMITTEE LOGS 14,872 UNPAID INQUIRIES FROM TEAL SQUARE ASSEMBLIES
stories.deck: Dialectical clarity quotas now require triplicate forms stamped by three separate comrades before any reply.
stories.article:
Pale-blue residents of Morune gathered yesterday in the cobbled squares to register questions left unanswered by Noah Mender-Socrates. Each inquiry was entered into leather-bound ledgers under the supervision of quota inspectors who tallied dialectical clarity points with abacus and fountain pen.

Requisitions for additional ledger ink have already been filed with the State Supply Directorate. Citizens were reminded that failure to log inquiries before the next shift bell constitutes an act of bourgeois evasion subject to re-education.

real_world_echo: Trump confirms he asked Fifa to review Balogun ban - mirrored as a minor functionary demanding central review of the unpaid-question exemption that Noah refuses to use
